who: procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10–50 invoices/month
offer: For procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual tracking causes delayed insights, leading to missed discounts. We automate vendor performance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting of vendor performance.
problem: Lack of timely insights into vendor performance metrics
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to procurement teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing procurement tools
try_it: Let users try monthly performance report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
